LearningSet.title: LearningSet
LearningSet.description: A set of progress tracking cards for a specific subject or skill.

id.description: The unique identifier of the set.

userId.description: The UID of the owner who created this set.

title.description: The title of the learning set.

description.description: Optional description of what is being tracked.

cards.description: The list of progress milestone cards in this set.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: The last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

/sets/{setId}.description: Collections of learning sets tracked by the user.
